trending_videos.title: Black Cat: The Master Thief| Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
trending_videos.description:
Cross her path and your luck runs out! 🍀

One of the world's premier thieves, Felicia Hardy glides across the battlefield with swift precision and a dancer's grace, ever ready to purloin an opponent's fortune. Those who meet the Black Cat's gaze should beware, as her omens never miss their mark!

Felicia Hardy is one of the most notorious thieves in the world. Once the Black Cat has her eyes on a prize, it's already as good as gone. This is one feline femme fatale you don't want to cross... because luck is always on her side!

The Black Cat was recruited by Wilson Fisk to infiltrate Doctor Strange's Sanctum Sanctorum and steal the Tablet of Life and Time. However, while Kingpin sought to harness its ancient power to counter Alchemax by making a deal with the Gilded Saint, she hatched a plan of her own to free his captives. Let the double cross commence!

Season 7.5 arrives on April 17, 2026

Keep your eyes on the prize, because this cat always lands on her feet.

Play free now on:
🔹 St

trending_videos.title: INSIDIOUS: OUT OF THE FURTHER - Official Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The Further comes for our world. 
Watch the official trailer for #Insidious: Out Of The Further - exclusively in theatres this August.


Follow us on social: 
https://www.instagram.com/InsidiousMovie   
https://twitter.com/InsidiousMovie  
https://www.facebook.com/InsidiousMovie  

Visit our site: https://insidious.movie 
Subscribe for more exclusive content: https://www.youtube.com/sonypictures 

Having earned over $740 million at the global box office, the Insidious franchise returns with a new family and a terror that redefines what The Further is capable of.
 
In Insidious: Out of the Further, Amelia Eve stars as Gemma, a young mother raising her daughter in the house she grew up in who discovers she can travel into The Further, the purgatorial realm of lost souls at the heart of the Insidious universe. When something evil comes after her, Gemma discovers an ability that changes everything: she doesn’t just enter The Further, she can bring what lives there back to the real world. O

trending_videos.title: Chicago Cubs at Philadelphia Phillies
trending_videos.description: Philadelphia hosts Chicago for a marquee Monday night thriller at the Citizens Bank Park. The Phillies feature a deep lineup with Adolis García and J.T. Realmuto, while the Cubs counter with Gold Glove defense and the power of Michael Busch.

trending_videos.title: Season 2: Summit Official Trailer | Overwatch
trending_videos.description:
The fight for a better future pushes even higher during Season 2: Summit.

Our newest Damage Hero is here with the arrival of Sierra. As Head of Security for Watchpoint: Grand Mesa, Sierra takes pride in protecting those around her, and she does so with an arsenal built for controlling spaces, high and low.

Post-Match Accolades are back, giving you the ability to vote for a match’s MVP. And that’s not the only thing returning! Antarctic Peninsula is also back with new pathways and sightlines to help you in battle.

New Battle Pass and Shop skins are also arriving like the new Spring Fairy skins, Panda Jetpack Cat skin, Sakura Bundle, and the new Season 2 Mythics for both Genji and Soldier: 76.

And that’s just the beginning! Enjoy our newest arrival to Stadium with Ramattra, and Jetpack Cat, the start of Overwatch’s 10 Year Anniversary, our latest collaboration and more coming midseason.

It all starts TOMORROW in Overwatch Season 2: Summit.

Overwatch is free to play on PC and consol

entertainment_and_gaming.description: A significant portion of the trending videos are related to entertainment and gaming, including trailers for movies and games.
examples: Black Cat: The Master Thief| Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping (2026) Official Trailer – Joseph Zada
INSIDIOUS: OUT OF THE FURTHER - Official Trailer (4K)
entertainment_and_gaming.insight: Trailers for upcoming movies and games are consistently popular, indicating high viewer interest in previews and exclusive reveals.

news_and_politics.description: News content also features prominently in trending videos, highlighting a consistent demand for current events coverage.
news_and_politics.insight: News channels continue to capture audience engagement with timely and relevant content.

sports.description: Sports content is represented through event coverage and analysis.
sports.insight: There is a strong interest in live sports events and related commentary, providing opportunities for channels to capitalize on sports seasons and drafts.

technology_and_announcements.description: Announcements and technology-related content, particularly from major companies, resonate with audiences.
technology_and_announcements.insight: Footage and announcements from major events like CinemaCon attract large viewership, indicating a market for exclusive industry insights.

niche_interests.description: Content targeting specific interests or fanbases can also trend, as seen with Pokémon-related content.
examples: Mega Meganium is WAY Better than I Thought
niche_interests.insight: Niche content, especially with a strong fan base, can achieve significant reach when leveraging popular franchises.

diversified_content.description: Channels are producing diverse content types ranging from trailers to live events and news shows.
diversified_content.insight: Creators and channels that diversify their content portfolio are more likely to engage with a broader audience.

leveraging_franchises.description: Channels associated with well-known franchises or brands tend to perform better.
leveraging_franchises.insight: Capitalizing on established franchises can significantly boost viewership and engagement.

exclusive_previews.description: There is an opportunity to focus on exclusive previews and behind-the-scenes content.
exclusive_previews.actionable_recommendation: Channels should aim to provide unique access or insights into upcoming releases, which could drive significant viewer interest.

cross-platform collaborations.description: Collaboration between news and entertainment sectors can capitalize on shared audiences.
cross-platform collaborations.actionable_recommendation: Consider partnerships between news channels and entertainment brands to create hybrid content that appeals to viewers interested in both areas.

live_event_coverage.description: Covering live events, including sports and industry announcements, has proven popular.
live_event_coverage.actionable_recommendation: Invest in live streaming capabilities and real-time engagement strategies to capture these audiences.

niche_fanbase_engagement.description: Targeting specific communities with tailored content can lead to viral success.
niche_fanbase_engagement.actionable_recommendation: Identify and create content for niche communities, using analytics to determine emerging interests and trends.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
